meta.title: About Us — Konko.ai
meta.description: Meet the team behind Konko.ai, the AI platform transforming patient care in clinics across Latin America.

hero.description: Konko.ai develops autonomous digital workers for medical clinics in Latin America. Our mission is to give healthcare teams back their time so they can focus on what matters most: the patient.

mission.heading: We don't digitize chaos. We solve it.
mission.body1: Traditional medical software only converted paper bureaucracy into digital bureaucracy — without solving the underlying problems. You fill out forms on a screen instead of on paper. The process remains just as inefficient.
mission.body2: At Konko.ai we build AI that amplifies clinical staff capabilities rather than replacing them. Every tool we create is designed to eliminate systemic friction and give back time to the people who save lives.

list.title: Intelligence with purpose
list.description: We build AI that solves real problems, not technology for the sake of innovating. Every feature exists to reduce friction in the healthcare system.

list.title: Extraordinary standards
list.description: We measure success by real impact on patients and clinics. Mediocre work has no place here — we aspire to excellence in everything we build.

list.title: Creative and courageous minds
list.description: We seek people who think differently, challenge assumptions, and have the courage to propose solutions no one else would consider.

list.title: Systemic impact
list.description: No patches. Structural solutions. We think about root problems and build tools that generate lasting change in how healthcare works in Latam.

team.heading: The people behind Konko
team.description: A world-class multidisciplinary team with experience in AI, healthcare, business, and technology.

members.name: Jean Marc Goguikian
members.bio: Medical clinic owner with experience at BCG, JP Morgan, and Harvard Business School. Built Konko from the frustration of running his own clinic.

members.name: Michael Haddad
members.bio: AI/ML expert with experience at C3 AI, Tesla, and Harvard Business School. Leads the technical architecture of all Konko products.

members.name: Oleksandr Danshyn
members.bio: AI/ML systems engineer. Experience at DataRobot and neu.ro.

members.name: Ivan Zubenko
members.bio: AI/ML systems engineer with experience at neu.ro.

culture.heading: Work with us
culture.description: We seek creative, intelligent minds passionate about building solutions that users genuinely value. If you're driven by high-impact work and refuse to settle for ordinary, you belong here.

pillars.title: High performance
pillars.description: Rewards are performance-based. Every team member has autonomy and ownership over their impact.

pillars.title: Systemic problem-solving
pillars.description: We don't do routine work for the sake of it. We question every process and find the smartest solution.

pillars.title: Elevated standards
pillars.description: Work that doesn't meet our standards doesn't ship. Quality is non-negotiable.

certifications.heading: Enterprise-grade security
certifications.description: The trust of our clients and their patients is our greatest responsibility.
certifications.badgeDescription: Audited and certified under the highest industry standards for security and availability.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your clinic?
cta.description: Join hundreds of clinics already using Konko to automate their operations and improve patient experience.
